Short Description:
Building Ideas nace como productora de contenidos relacionados a las artes, la moda y el diseño.

Nuestro desafío arraiga  en la búsqueda de aquellos conceptos fundantes e inherentes a los proyectos y en la sinergia de los mismos. Mediante la integración del arte y el diseño como elementos transformadores y diferenciadores, se logra la integración entre partes indiferenciadas, acción que genera energía y armonía en las cosas. 

"Para encontrarte en lo infinito 
has de diferenciar para luego juntar." Goethe 

Éste es nuestro foco, nuestro objetivo, nuestro modus operandi. Nuestra manera de generar valor agregado y aportar autenticidad e idoneidad a las cosas que impulsamos.



Building Ideas was born as a project specified in the development of contents related to arts, fashion and design.
 
Our challenge makes root in searching those founding and inherent concepts of the projects and the synergy between them. Incorporating art and design -as transformer and differential elements- we achieve the integration between non differentiated parts, action that generates both energy and harmony in things.

"To find yourself in the infinite
you must differentiate to gather afterwards". Goethe

This is our focus, our target, our modus operandi. Our way to generate surplus and bring authenticity and genuineness in the things that we impulse.

Short Description:
Try Me es una empresa Argentina que se fundó en el año 1981 y desde entonces, se dedica al diseño, producción y comercialización de ropa femenina de moda. Luego de numerosos años de experiencia y desarrollo de productos orientados al gusto de las mujeres de nuestro país, Try Me ha logrado posicionarse en el mercado y es una de las marcas más queridas por el sexo femenino.
La calidad de las telas, su diseño adaptado a las últimas tendencias de la moda internacional, una muy buena confección de las prendas, y precios amigables es nuestra Filosofía. La ropa de Try Me permite a la mujer vestir a la moda de una manera fresca y simple, para disfrutar en el espacio urbano y al aire libre tanto de día como de noche.
Los locales de Try Me, están ambientados con calidez, para que nuestras clientas se sientan cómodas. La incorporación de productos nuevos es constante, con lo cual nuestras clientas pueden renovar su look a diario, así la moda vive y se recrea en vos.
TRY ME, inspiración para el Alma.

Short Description:
Mattelsa is a premium streetwear brand based in Colombia, dedicated to creating a community that values life, sustainability, and high-quality clothing. The brand originated from an underground retail concept and has evolved to focus on quality and respect for both people and the planet. With 49 stores across Colombia and a presence in 27 countries, Mattelsa aims to connect with streetwear enthusiasts who appreciate ethical fashion.

The company specializes in premium streetwear made from high-quality, natural-origin materials. Its product offerings include oversized men's clothing, women's tops, jeans, and essential streetwear staples like t-shirts and hoodies. Mattelsa emphasizes durability in its designs to promote responsible consumption. Through its Regeneration Culture foundation, the brand reinvests 100% of its profits into projects that support environmental recovery and education, reflecting its commitment to sustainability and community development.

Short Description:
For over 13 years, Conspiración Moda has been redefining how women connect with fashion in Mexico, becoming the first company in the country to introduce luxury dress rental and setting a new standard for style, innovation and sustainability. With 20 locations inside Liverpool department stores, a growing global e-commerce presence and the creation of Bärly, our pioneering intimate apparel brand, we have become a reference for modern, conscious fashion.

We believe access to luxury should be as versatile as women's lives, offering the freedom to rent, buy or choose pre-loved pieces while championing circular fashion. Today, Conspiración Moda stands at the forefront of retail innovation, taking Mexican creativity to the world stage.

Short Description:
Billabong Argentina is a subsidiary of Billabong International Limited, an Australian company known for its surf and snowboard apparel and accessories. Established in 1973, Billabong Argentina operates within the clothing and apparel retail industry, employing around 282 people and generating annual revenue of $9.9 million. The company is a key player in the regional market, contributing to Billabong's presence in over 25 countries.

The company offers a wide range of surf and snowboard clothing and accessories for men, women, and children. Their product lineup includes board shorts, neoprene wetsuits, snowboard clothing, fashion tops, and various accessories like watches and backpacks. Billabong Argentina also features an online e-commerce platform, providing customers with flexible payment options. The brand is dedicated to quality and durability, appealing to surfers, snowboarders, and lifestyle consumers who appreciate both technical performance and fashion in action sports culture.
